tooltip.bsb.custom_boss_spawner: §6This mob spawner texture comes from a resource pack by Xeker and has been authorized
message.bsb.config.open: Please open the config screen through the game menu
config.bsb.boss_spawner.title: Boss Spawner Configuration
config.bsb.catalogue.title: Boss Spawner Block
message.bsb.command.create.success: Created boss spawner item with label: %s
message.bsb.command.list.title: Boss Spawner List:
message.bsb.command.list.empty: No spawners created yet. Use /bsb create <label> to create one.
message.bsb.command.give.default: Config file for label '%s' not found. Using default entity.
message.bsb.command.delete.not_found: Config file for label '%s' not found.
message.bsb.command.help.title: Boss Spawner Block Commands:
message.bsb.command.help.create: /bsb create <label> [entity_id/chinese_name] [description] - Create a new boss spawner with label
message.bsb.command.help.description: Description: Custom display name for the spawner item (supports Chinese and symbols)
message.bsb.command.help.entity_id_note: Entity ID: Supports full spawn egg ID (e.g., minecraft:pig_spawn_egg) or Chinese name from mapping (e.g., 牛)
message.bsb.command.help.symbol_note: Support: Entity ID supports input with spaces and symbols (e.g., minecraft:custom_entity;123)
message.bsb.command.help.example: Example: /bsb create dragon minecraft:ender_dragon_spawn_egg My Ender Dragon Boss
message.bsb.command.help.example2: Example: /bsb create cow 牛 My Cow Boss
message.bsb.command.help.example3: Example: /bsb create custom minecraft:custom_entity;123 My Custom Boss
message.bsb.command.help.list: /bsb list - List all created boss spawners
message.bsb.command.help.give: /bsb give <label> - Give the boss spawner with label to player
message.bsb.command.help.delete: /bsb delete <label> - Delete the boss spawner with label
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.empty: Error: Spawn egg ID cannot be empty
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.not_found: Error: Spawn egg item not found: %s
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.not_egg: Error: Item is not a spawn egg: %s
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.no_entity: Error: Cannot get entity type from spawn egg: %s
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.format: Error: Invalid spawn egg ID format: %s
message.bsb.spawn_egg.invalid.hint: Please check the config file at .minecraft/config/bsb/[label].toml and use a valid spawn egg ID
